capacity_reservation_group_id.description: Specifies the ID of the capacity reservation group to associate with the node pool, ensuring reserved compute capacity for nodes.

custom_ca_trust_enabled.description: Indicates whether custom Certificate Authority (CA) trust is enabled for the node pool.

enable_auto_scaling.description: Determines whether the node pool should automatically scale the number of nodes based on workload demand.

enable_host_encryption.description: Determines whether host encryption is enabled for the node pool, ensuring additional data security.

enable_node_public_ip.description: Determines whether public IP addresses are assigned to the nodes in the node pool. Must be `true` or `false`.

eviction_policy.description: Defines the eviction behavior for nodes, determining whether they are cordoned and drained before deletion or immediately removed.

fips_enabled.description: Enables FIPS compliance for the node pool; requires FIPS-enabled nodes and compatible OS configurations.

gpu_instance.description: Defines the VM size for GPU-enabled nodes in the node pool, optimized for compute-intensive workloads requiring GPU acceleration.

host_group_id.description: Specifies the ID of the dedicated host group to assign the node pool to, requiring that the cluster uses a VM size compatible with the host group.

kubelet_config.description: Defines the configuration settings for the kubelet on the node pool, including performance tuning and resource management parameters.
kubelet_config.type: list(object({allowed_unsafe_sysctls: optional(list(string)),container_log_max_line: optional(number),container_log_max_size_mb: optional(number),cpu_cfs_quota_enabled: optional(bool),cpu_cfs_quota_period: optional(string),cpu_manager_policy: optional(string),image_gc_high_threshold: optional(number),image_gc_low_threshold: optional(number),pod_max_pid: optional(number),topology_manager_policy: optional(string)}))

kubelet_disk_type.description: Specifies the type of disk used by the kubelet; acceptable values are 'OS' or 'Temporary'.

kubernetes_cluster_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Kubernetes cluster to attach the node pool to; must be an existing Azure Kubernetes Service cluster.

linux_os_config.description: Specifies the configuration settings for the Linux operating system on the node pool, including customizations like SSH access and file system options.
linux_os_config.type: list(object({swap_file_size_mb: optional(number),transparent_huge_page_defrag: optional(string),transparent_huge_page_enabled: optional(string),sysctl_config: list(object({fs_aio_max_nr: optional(number),fs_file_max: optional(number),fs_inotify_max_user_watches: optional(number),fs_nr_open: optional(number),kernel_threads_max: optional(number),net_core_netdev_max_backlog: optional(number),net_core_optmem_max: optional(number),net_core_rmem_default: optional(number),net_core_rmem_max: optional(number),net_core_somaxconn: optional(number),net_core_wmem_default: optional(number),net_core_wmem_max: optional(number),net_ipv4_ip_local_port_range_max: optional(number),net_ipv4_ip_local_port_range_min: optional(number),net_ipv4_neigh_default_gc_thresh1: optional(number),net_ipv4_neigh_default_gc_thresh2: optional(number),net_ipv4_neigh_default_gc_thresh3: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_fin_timeout: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_keepalive_intvl: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_keepalive_probes: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_keepalive_time: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_max_syn_backlog: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_max_tw_buckets: optional(number),net_ipv4_tcp_tw_reuse: optional(bool),net_netfilter_nf_conntrack_buckets: optional(number),net_netfilter_nf_conntrack_max: optional(number),vm_max_map_count: optional(number),vm_swappiness: optional(number),vm_vfs_cache_pressure: optional(number)}))}))

max_count.description: Maximum number of nodes allowed in the node pool for scaling operations; must be greater than or equal to the initial node count.

max_pods.description: Defines the maximum number of pods that can be scheduled on a single node in the node pool.

message_of_the_day.description: Specifies the message displayed to users upon logging into the nodes; must be a non-empty string.

min_count.description: Specifies the minimum number of nodes in the node pool. Must be less than or equal to `max_count` and greater than or equal to 0.

mode.description: Defines the operating mode of the node pool, such as "System" for critical system pods or "User" for general application workloads.

name.description: Specifies the name of the node pool; must be unique within the Kubernetes cluster and adhere to Azure naming conventions.

node_count.description: Specifies the number of nodes to provision in the node pool, must be greater than or equal to the minimum node count.

node_labels.description: Specifies key-value pairs to label nodes in the pool, used for organizing and categorizing resources; keys must conform to Kubernetes label syntax.

node_network_profile.description: Defines the network configuration for the node pool, including settings for pod CIDR, service CIDR, and DNS policy. Must align with the cluster's network profile.

node_public_ip_prefix_id.description: Specifies the ID of the public IP prefix to assign public IPs to the nodes in the node pool. Must be in the same region as the cluster.

node_taints.description: Defines custom scheduling constraints for nodes in the pool, specifying key-value pairs and effects to control which pods can run on the nodes.

orchestrator_version.description: Specifies the Kubernetes version for the node pool. Must match a supported version for the cluster's region and API.

os_disk_size_gb.description: Specifies the size of the OS disk in gigabytes for each node in the pool; must be a positive integer.

os_disk_type.description: Specifies the type of disk to use for the operating system, such as 'Managed' or 'Ephemeral'.

os_sku.description: Specifies the operating system SKU for the nodes in the Kubernetes cluster node pool.

os_type.description: Specifies the operating system type for the node pool, such as Linux or Windows.

pod_subnet_id.description: Specifies the ID of the subnet where pods will be deployed, ensuring network isolation for the node pool. Must belong to the same virtual network as the cluster.

priority.description: Defines the priority level for the node pool, specifying whether it is a regular or spot node pool for cost optimization.

proximity_placement_group_id.description: Specifies the ID of the proximity placement group to optimize node pool latency. Must be an existing proximity placement group in the same region.

scale_down_mode.description: Specifies the behavior for scaling down nodes in the node pool, such as whether to delete or deallocate nodes.

snapshot_id.description: Specifies the ID of the snapshot to use when creating the node pool. Must be an existing snapshot ID in the same region as the cluster.

spot_max_price.description: Defines the maximum hourly price willing to pay for a spot instance in the node pool. Must be greater than zero and specified in USD.

tags.description: Specifies custom tags to assign to the node pool resources for categorization or identification purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines custom time durations for operations like create, update, and delete actions for the Kubernetes node pool.

ultra_ssd_enabled.description: Specifies whether UltraSSD is enabled for the node pool; requires compatible VM sizes and regions.

upgrade_settings.description: Configuration settings for node pool upgrades, including mode and surge options.

vm_size.description: Defines the size of the virtual machines used for the nodes in the pool; must be a valid Azure VM SKU.

vnet_subnet_id.description: Specifies the ID of the subnet within the virtual network where the node pool will be deployed. Must be within the same region as the Kubernetes cluster.

windows_profile.description: Configures Windows settings for the node pool, including credentials and other Windows-specific parameters.

workload_runtime.description: Defines the runtime used for container workloads, specifying compatibility (e.g., "Linux" or "Windows"). Ensure the chosen runtime matches workload requirements.

zones.description: Specifies the availability zones for the node pool. Must be a list of valid Azure zone identifiers for the region.
